x-enumeration-literals.name: Payee Alias Usage Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Define how the alias can be used for payments.

Comment:
Alias can only be used by the registered customer.
Allowed transaction types (instant transfer, recurring payment, bulk payment).
Restrictions on cross-border or high-risk payments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payee Alias Liability Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
pecify responsibility in case of errors, fraud, or misuse.

Comment:
Bank is not liable if a payment is sent to the wrong alias due to customer error.
Customer is responsible for keeping alias information accurate.
Dispute resolution process in case of incorrect payments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payee Alias Security Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules to ensure safe use and compliance with regulations.

Comment:
Customer must maintain security of their login credentials.
Payments via alias are subject to AML (Anti-Money Laundering) and fraud monitoring.
Bank may suspend or block aliases if suspicious activity is detected.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payee Alias Modification Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules for changing or deactivating aliases.

Comment:
Customer can update or delete an alias.
Bank may deactivate an alias for security or regulatory reasons.
Effective date and notice period for changes.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payee Alias Notification Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
How the bank communicates about alias usage.

Comment::
Alerts for payments sent to or received from an alias.
Notifications for failed or suspicious transactions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payee Alias Regulatory Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Ensure the alias adheres to legal and regulatory requirements.

Comment::
Alias usage must comply with local banking laws.
Certain alias types may require KYC verification.
Alias cannot be used for illegal activities (sanctions, fraud, or money laundering).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payee Alias Eligibility Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Confirm that the alias is valid and controlled by the correct payee.

Comment::
OTP (one-time password) sent to phone/email.
Linking alias to a verified bank account.
KYC verification required for certain alias types (corporate accounts, high-risk categories).
